title: 🟢 Multiple Consecutive Ranges
description: 🚀 Compress multiple consecutive number streaks into compact ranges.

title: 🔵 Mixed Single Numbers and Ranges
description: 🧩 Handles isolated numbers along with consecutive sequences.

title: 🟣 Empty Number List
description: 📭 Returns an empty range list when no numbers are provided.

title: 🟡 Single Number Range
description: 🎯 Converts a single element into a standalone range.

title: 🟠 All Numbers Are Consecutive
description: 🔥 Merges the complete array into one continuous range.

title: 🔴 No Consecutive Numbers
description: 🎯 Keeps every number separate when no consecutive streak exists.

title: 🟢 Consecutive Numbers at Start
description: 🚀 Detects ranges beginning from the first array elements.

title: 🔵 Large Integer Values
description: 💪 Handles ranges containing extreme integer values.

title: 🟣 Two Element Consecutive Range
description: 🔗 Creates a range from a simple consecutive pair.

title: 🟡 Consecutive Ranges With Multiple Gaps
description: 🗺️ Separates multiple streaks divided by missing numbers.

title: 🟢 Entire Array As Single Range
description: 🔥 Combines a fully consecutive array into one compressed range.

title: 🔵 Alternating Single Numbers
description: 🎯 Keeps every value separate when no consecutive numbers exist.

title: 🟣 Negative Number Sequence
description: ❄️ Handles consecutive ranges containing negative integers.

title: 🟡 Negative And Positive Mix
description: 🌍 Groups consecutive values across negative and positive boundaries.

title: 🟠 Long Range With Small Gaps
description: 🧩 Splits numbers into multiple compact ranges separated by gaps.

title: 🔴 Large Gap Between Ranges
description: 🌉 Detects separate ranges with large missing intervals.

title: 🟢 Consecutive Pair Followed By Singles
description: 🔗 Identifies small consecutive groups mixed with isolated values.

title: 🔵 Range Starting From Minimum Integer
description: 💪 Validates handling of the smallest possible integer values.

title: 🟣 Range Ending At Maximum Integer
description: 🚀 Validates handling of the largest possible integer values.

title: 🟡 Multiple Small Ranges
description: 📦 Creates multiple compact ranges from small consecutive groups.

title: 🟠 Single Element At Large Value
description: 🎯 Handles a single large integer correctly.

title: 🔴 Empty Input Handling
description: 📭 Returns no ranges when the input array is empty.

title: 🟢 Almost Complete Sequence
description: 🛤️ Splits a nearly continuous sequence around a missing number.

title: 🔵 Three Consecutive Blocks
description: 🗺️ Detects multiple independent consecutive blocks.

title: 🟣 Full Constraint Size Input
description: 🏆 Tests maximum input size with multiple range patterns.
